export const COLORS = {
  background: '#0f172a',
  surface: '#1e293b',
  surfaceHighlight: '#334155',
  primary: '#3b82f6',
  primaryHover: '#2563eb',
  success: '#22c55e',
  warning: '#f59e0b',
  danger: '#ef4444',
  text: '#f8fafc',
  textMuted: '#94a3b8',
  border: '#334155'
};
